message:
refactor: Duration::from_mins in remote.rs tests, sync issue tracker

- remote.rs: normalize Duration::from_secs(60|120|300) → from_mins(1|2|5)
  across 12 test sites: RemoteCap builder, lease propagation,
  ComputeRequest construction, and IdempotencyStore tests (new, duplicate,
  conflict, complete_outcome, complete_unknown_key, eviction, debug)

- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
